claim: Claude Skills persist instructions once saved, eliminating repeated prompting for repetitive tasks across multiple interactions
actionable: Create Skills for repetitive tasks (quote generation, customer responses, data formatting) to avoid retyping instructions

claim: Skill Creator tool automatically formats YAML front matter and markdown structure, lowering barrier to creating custom Skills
actionable: Use Skill Creator to avoid manual YAML formatting; focus on defining what the skill should do, not syntax

claim: Over a third of publicly available AI skills contain security flaws; malicious skills can steal data without user knowledge
actionable: Only install Anthropic-built skills or review third-party skill source code before installation; build your own when possible

claim: Claude's hot-reload of Skills allows immediate testing of skill logic changes without reinstalling
actionable: Iterate on skill logic rapidly by editing and saving; Claude will pick up changes automatically

claim: Skills are available on all Claude plans (free, pro, max) but require code execution enabled for full functionality
actionable: Enable code execution in Claude settings to use Skills; ensure you're signed in for code execution support
